summary: First-pass smoke test of Yeolpum study app. Backend: 13 endpoints verified via curl (auth/login, subjects GET+POST, timer start/current/stop, tasks POST, logs?range=week, groups POST/public/mine). Frontend: E2E Playwright flow logged in as fresh user, added Math subject, ran 3s timer session, added+toggled task, created public group 'Focus Cafe', started WS-driven quick-start session (member timer ticked to 00:00:02 live), toggled Calendar Day/Week/Month, verified 91 heatmap cells and prev/next range label change, and logged out returning to /. All 8 UI flows and all backend endpoints returned expected data.
passed: Timer page: add subject, switch subject, start/stop timer, today-total renders (0m due to <1min rounding)
Groups: create public 'Focus Cafe' navigates to /app/groups/:id with room name + invite code
WebSocket: quick-start subject in group room shows live-ticking member-timer (00:00:02)
Calendar: 91 heatmap cells, Day/Week/Month toggles, prev/next changes range-label (e.g., 'Jul 6 — Jul 12' -> 'Jun 29 — Jul 5')
Sidebar nav (Timer/Groups/Calendar) and logout clears localStorage, returns to /
action_items: Minor UX note (not blocking): 'today-total' and 'range-total' display '0m' for sub-minute sessions; backend correctly stores 3s. Consider showing seconds when <1min.
test_credentials: Loaded from /app/memory/test_credentials.md — username-only auth, any string works
